sourceSummary.oneLine: Contents list for clinical evaluation, PMCF, literature study, and CER appendix documents with document numbers, revisions, and revision dates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability of clinical evaluation documentation and related CER appendices by listing document numbers, revision numbers, and revision dates.
keyPoints: Clinical Evaluation Plan is Document No. A-TCF-5-117, Revision No. 2, Revision Date March 8, 2024.
Clinical Evaluation Report is Document No. A-TCF-5-118, Revision No. 3, Revision Date April 12, 2024.
Post Market Clinical Follow-up Plan is Document No. A-PMCFP-5-001, Revision No. 2, Revision Date March 8, 2024.
Post Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report is Document No. A-PMCFEP-5-001, Revision No. 0, Revision Date A year after it's on the market.
Literature Study is Document No. A-TCF-5-120, Revision No. 2, Revision Date March 8, 2024.

reviewFlags.reason: No product model is stated in the provided source text.
No authority or jurisdiction is stated in the provided source text; authoritySignal metadata says MFDS/domestic but is not present in the document text.
The source text lists multiple documents with different revision numbers and revision dates, so document-level revisionOrVersion and documentDate are left empty.
Post Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report revision date is relative rather than a concrete calendar date: "A year after it's on the market."
